summary: The user is planning a trip to Tokyo in October and seeks recommendations for onsen, must-see places, restaurants, and transportation options. They express excitement about their trip, mention their accommodation in Shinjuku, and inquire about the Tsukiji Fish Market and cooking classes to learn Japanese dishes.

The user is staying in the Shinjuku district of Tokyo.
The user booked a round-trip ticket to Tokyo three weeks ago.
